english: Please take me to this address.
pinyin: Qǐng dài wǒ qù zhège dìzhǐ.
usageNote: Show this to a taxi or DiDi driver when you already have the address ready.
Use this before the ride starts if you are taking a street taxi.

english: How much will it cost approximately?
usageNote: Ask for a rough estimate before agreeing to a longer ride.

pinyin: Qǐng zǒu zuì kuài de lùxiàn.
usageNote: Useful when you are in a hurry or heading to a station or airport.

english: Please take me to the nearest subway station.
chinese: 请带我去最近的地铁站。
pinyin: Qǐng dài wǒ qù zuìjìn de dìtiě zhàn.
usageNote: Use this if traffic is bad and you want to switch to the metro.
audioText: 请带我去最近的地铁站。
